name: Cucumber in Sour Cream Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Dill seed or 1 tablespoon fresh chopped dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the cucumber slices with salt.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Drain thoroughly and pat dry with a paper towel.
4. In a bowl, combine sour cream, white vinegar, Tabasco sauce, chives, dill (fresh or dried), and pepper.
5. Pour the dressing over the cucumber slices.
6. Chill well before serving.
7. Garnish with fresh chopped dill.
